tips: Check maps and highway conditions on the day of departure.
Avoid long night drives on unfamiliar highways.
Keep buffer time for meals, fuel, traffic, and fatigue.
Carry vehicle papers, FASTag balance, first-aid kit, water, and offline maps.
Travel outside peak weekends and holidays for better hotel prices.
Use public transport or app cabs selectively inside cities.
Choose stays near the main sightseeing zone to save commute time.
Keep a 10-15% buffer for last-minute local expenses.
Carry layers instead of one heavy jacket.
Check fog delays in North India during December and January.
Start sightseeing early because winter daylight is shorter.
